MS.S: (C) Copyright 2013-2024 Hewlett Packard Enterprise Development LP_x000A__x000A_ Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy_x000A_ of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal_x000A_ in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights_x000A_ to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell_x000A_ copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is_x000A_ furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:_x000A__x000A_ The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in_x000A_ all copies or substantial portions of the Software._x000A__x000A_ THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR_x000A_ IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,_x000A_ FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE_x000A_ AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER_x000A_ LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,_x000A_ OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN_x000A_ THE SOFTWARE.

Release 8.60.3997.3057_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- Initial HPE OneView 8.60 library release._x000D__x000A_- Support for PowerShell 5 and 6 is now deprecated and is no longer supported._x000D__x000A_- [#647] Fixed ConvertTo-OVPowerShellScript mishandling BIOS consistency policy when parsing a server profile template._x000D__x000A_- [#642] Fixed incorrect use of internal variable within Update-OVServerFirmware._x000D__x000A_- [#654] Fixed ConvertTo-OVPowerShellScript mishandling Tunnel uplink set resources._x000D__x000A_- [#656] Fixed parameter evaluation bug with Update-OVServerProfile and the -Stage parameter._x000D__x000A_- Added Cmdlets to manage HPE GreenLake for Compute Ops Managment - OneView Edition service configuration and status from the appliance._x000D__x000A_- Added workaround to supporting Gen10 Plus V2 platforms and supporting firmware management._x000D__x000A_- Added Update-OVRemoteSupportEntitlement Cmdlet to refresh remote support entitlement data with the backend._x000D__x000A_- Updated Get-OVRemoteSupportSetting and Get-OVRemoteSupportEntitlementStatus to support interconnect resources._x000D__x000A_- Added HPE GreenLake for Compute Ops Management - OneView Edition Cmdlets; Get-OVComputeOpsManagement, Set-OVComputeOpsManagement, Connect-OVComputeOpsManagement, Enable-OVComputeOpsManagement, Disable-OVComputeOpsManagement_x000D__x000A_- Added Alletra 9000 FC-NVMe support to Add-OVStorageSystem._x000D__x000A_- Added MegaRAID support to New-OVServerProfileLogicalDiskController._x000D__x000A_- Added Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController to return discovered disk drive controllers for volume servers (DL, ML, Apollo) and drives. New classes added HPEOneView.Servers.StorageController and HPEOneView.Servers.PhysicalDrive._x000D__x000A_- Added the ability to specify controller returned from Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController._x000D__x000A_- Added the ability to specify specific drives in New-OVServerProfileLogicalDisk after invoking Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController to get list of controllers and available drives that are part of the HPEOneView.Servers.StorageController.Drives property._x000D__x000A_- Updated core library to handle web proxy in a more efficient method._x000D__x000A_- Updated core library to use TLS1.2 only._x000D__x000A_- [#659] Enhanced Show-OVFirmwareReport to provide available baseline version._x000D__x000A_- [#662] Resolved issue with Update-OVServerProfile not handling -Stage parameter correctly._x000D__x000A_- Enhanced New-OVBackup to require passphrase to create backup file._x000D__x000A_- Enhanced Send-OVRequest to handle appliance certificate validation errors correctly._x000D__x000A_- Changed Get-OVApplianceUpdateSchedule to Get-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed Set-OVApplianceUpdateSchedule to Set-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed Get-OVApplianceUpdate to Get-OVFirmwareBundleUpdate. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed HPEOneView.Appliance.ApplianceUpdate class to HPEOneView.Appliance.FirmwareBundleUpdate._x000D__x000A_- Changed HPEOneView.Appliance.ApplianceUpdateSchedule class to HPEOneView.Appliance.FirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule._x000D__x000A_- Removed -PreviewOnly switch parameter from Update-OVServerFirmware, as the API doesn't provide a compliance feature._x000D__x000A_- Fixed an issue with Set-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule where the value for -Time was not properly handled when converting to UTC time.

(C) Copyright 2013-2024 Hewlett Packard Enterprise Development LP_x000A__x000A_ Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy_x000A_ of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal_x000A_ in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights_x000A_ to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell_x000A_ copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is_x000A_ furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:_x000A__x000A_ The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in_x000A_ all copies or substantial portions of the Software._x000A__x000A_ THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR_x000A_ IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,_x000A_ FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE_x000A_ AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER_x000A_ LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,_x000A_ OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN_x000A_ THE SOFTWARE.

Release 8.60.3997.3057_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- Initial HPE OneView 8.60 library release._x000D__x000A_- Support for PowerShell 5 and 6 is now deprecated and is no longer supported._x000D__x000A_- [#647] Fixed ConvertTo-OVPowerShellScript mishandling BIOS consistency policy when parsing a server profile template._x000D__x000A_- [#642] Fixed incorrect use of internal variable within Update-OVServerFirmware._x000D__x000A_- [#654] Fixed ConvertTo-OVPowerShellScript mishandling Tunnel uplink set resources._x000D__x000A_- [#656] Fixed parameter evaluation bug with Update-OVServerProfile and the -Stage parameter._x000D__x000A_- Added Cmdlets to manage HPE GreenLake for Compute Ops Managment - OneView Edition service configuration and status from the appliance._x000D__x000A_- Added workaround to supporting Gen10 Plus V2 platforms and supporting firmware management._x000D__x000A_- Added Update-OVRemoteSupportEntitlement Cmdlet to refresh remote support entitlement data with the backend._x000D__x000A_- Updated Get-OVRemoteSupportSetting and Get-OVRemoteSupportEntitlementStatus to support interconnect resources._x000D__x000A_- Added HPE GreenLake for Compute Ops Management - OneView Edition Cmdlets; Get-OVComputeOpsManagement, Set-OVComputeOpsManagement, Connect-OVComputeOpsManagement, Enable-OVComputeOpsManagement, Disable-OVComputeOpsManagement_x000D__x000A_- Added Alletra 9000 FC-NVMe support to Add-OVStorageSystem._x000D__x000A_- Added MegaRAID support to New-OVServerProfileLogicalDiskController._x000D__x000A_- Added Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController to return discovered disk drive controllers for volume servers (DL, ML, Apollo) and drives. New classes added HPEOneView.Servers.StorageController and HPEOneView.Servers.PhysicalDrive._x000D__x000A_- Added the ability to specify controller returned from Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController._x000D__x000A_- Added the ability to specify specific drives in New-OVServerProfileLogicalDisk after invoking Get-OVServerHardwareAvailableController to get list of controllers and available drives that are part of the HPEOneView.Servers.StorageController.Drives property._x000D__x000A_- Updated core library to handle web proxy in a more efficient method._x000D__x000A_- Updated core library to use TLS1.2 only._x000D__x000A_- [#659] Enhanced Show-OVFirmwareReport to provide available baseline version._x000D__x000A_- [#662] Resolved issue with Update-OVServerProfile not handling -Stage parameter correctly._x000D__x000A_- Enhanced New-OVBackup to require passphrase to create backup file._x000D__x000A_- Enhanced Send-OVRequest to handle appliance certificate validation errors correctly._x000D__x000A_- Changed Get-OVApplianceUpdateSchedule to Get-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed Set-OVApplianceUpdateSchedule to Set-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed Get-OVApplianceUpdate to Get-OVFirmwareBundleUpdate. Alias to original Cmdlet is available for backwards compatibility. Please update your scripts._x000D__x000A_- Changed HPEOneView.Appliance.ApplianceUpdate class to HPEOneView.Appliance.FirmwareBundleUpdate._x000D__x000A_- Changed HPEOneView.Appliance.ApplianceUpdateSchedule class to HPEOneView.Appliance.FirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule._x000D__x000A_- Removed -PreviewOnly switch parameter from Update-OVServerFirmware, as the API doesn't provide a compliance feature._x000D__x000A_- Fixed an issue with Set-OVFirmwareBundleUpdateSchedule where the value for -Time was not properly handled when converting to UTC time.
